BackstoryDef.title: Nature child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in the wilderness by their family. [PAWN_nameDef] would learn valuable survival skills, like how to identify poisonous fruits and berries, how to properly care for plants, and how to survive dangerous animal encounters. [PAWN_nameDef] was never introduced into society properly until later in life due to rampant deforestation and urbanization of their homeworld.
